message:
fix(freshness): add RefreshIndicator to last 2 cards (#6217 part 5) (#6262)

Final part of #6217. Adds RefreshIndicator to the last two cards from
the auto-QA list:

* NetworkOverview — services cache, header left
* HelmValuesDiff — releases cache (uses the merged refresh state from
  clusters/releases/values), header next to "{N} values" label

This completes the freshness-indicator pass across all 14 cards from
the auto-QA finding (KedaStatus was excluded since it already had one).

Closes #6217

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
